TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Zihing == alang Zihing ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 256 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 242 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan91%, Amis1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zihing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing hya' ga Triqan. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga Rangay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Zihing alang Zihing ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu ((|Hosing Ku|Hosing Ku)), kwara sali buwan nya ga 79 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 230 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga Twan nokan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == ziħiŋ == alaŋ ziħiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan**%, amis~ɕ*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa raŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ziħiŋ alaŋ ziħiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ((|ħos~ɕiŋ ku|ħos~ɕiŋ ku)), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa twan nokan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: == Zihing == alang Zihing ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 256 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 242 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan91%, Amis1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zihing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing hya' ga Triqan. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga Rangay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Zihing alang Zihing ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu ((|Hosing Ku|Hosing Ku)), kwara sali buwan nya ga 79 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 230 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Zihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Zihing (Ziehing) hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Zihing hya' ga Twan nokan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == ziħiŋ == alaŋ ziħiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan**%, amis~ɕ*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa raŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ziħiŋ alaŋ ziħiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ((|ħos~ɕiŋ ku|ħos~ɕiŋ ku)), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ) ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa twan nokan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
